```{r surgery rate table}
#| label: tab-surgery-rates
#| tbl-cap: "Surgical procedures"
#| tbl-cap-location: bottom

tmp <- data |>
  neoipcr::get_surgery_rate_table() |>
  neoipcr::pretty_names()

col_names <- attr(tmp, "names.pretty")
row_names <- attr(tmp, "row.names.pretty")
proc_cat <- col_names[["procedure_category"]]

out <- tmp |>
  gt(rowname_col = proc_cat) |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = col_names[["n"]], decimals = 0) |>
  cols_width(matches(proc_cat) ~ pct(35)) |>
  tab_row_group(
    label = "By category",
    rows = proc_cat != row_names[["overall"]],
    id = "grp_cat") |>
  tab_options(footnotes.font.size = pct(60)) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Procedure rate",
    columns = c(
      col_names[["rate"]],
      col_names[["q1"]],
      col_names[["q2"]],
      col_names[["q3"]]),
    id = "procedure_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        "Procedure rate",
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        "Procedures",
        "}}{\\text{",
        "Patients",
        "}} \\times ",
        format(100, big.mark = locale_sep_mark),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "procedure_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "No of procedures: The aggregated number surgical procedures performed in all infants.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = col_names[["n"]])) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Pooled mean: The procedure rate calculated as procedures per 100 patients calculated across all infants.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = col_names[["rate"]])) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = paste(paste(col_names[["q1"]],col_names[["q2"]],col_names[["q3"]], sep = ", "), ": The quartiles (25%, 50% and 75% quantiles) of the procedure rates of the partner departments."),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(col_names[["q1"]],col_names[["q2"]],col_names[["q3"]])))

# cats <- neoipcr:::get_procedure_categories(data, pretty = TRUE)
# col_names2 <- attr(cats, "names.pretty")
# for (i in 1:nrow(tmp)) {
#   name <- unlist(tmp[i,1], use.names = FALSE)
#   if(name == row_names[["overall"]])
#     next
#
#     out <- out |>
#       tab_footnote(
#         footnote = cats |>
#           dplyr::filter(!!as.name(col_names2[["procedure_category"]]) == !!name) |>
#           dplyr::select(tidyselect::all_of(col_names2[["procedure_code"]])) |>
#           dplyr::distinct() |>
#           dplyr::inner_join(ichi_health_interventions, dplyr::join_by(!!as.name(col_names2[["procedure_code"]]) == code)) |>
#           dplyr::arrange(dplyr::pick(tidyselect::all_of(col_names2[["procedure_code"]]))) |>
#           dplyr::mutate(x = paste0("[",.data$intervention,"](",.data$url,")"), .keep = "none") |>
#           dplyr::pull(x) |>
#           paste0(collapse = ", ") |>
#           gt::md(),
#         locations = gt::cells_stub(rows = name))
# }

out
```
